analysis.consistency: High. The description is internally consistent regarding the capacities (weight/volume) and the functional limitations (overload, piercing, turning inside out, use of action for retrieval).
analysis.quality: High. The description clearly defines the item's function, capacity, limitations, and catastrophic failure conditions, which is standard for magical item descriptions.

mechanics.special_feature: Specific item is always magically on top when reaching in.
limitations: Contents spill if turned inside out (must be fixed to use again).
Breathing creature survives up to 10 minutes inside.
Placing inside another extradimensional storage (like bag of holding) destroys both and creates a one-way astral plane gate, sucking in creatures within 10 feet.
